description: ConversationTracker eval — Resumption check. Given a paused conversation summary and a new chunk, should the conversation resume? YES or NO.

cases.summary: Team was discussing the Q3 product roadmap. Decided to keep the notification redesign in Q3 with reduced scope. Mike is leading the effort.
cases.chunk: So going back to the notifications, I think we should focus on email notifications first and add push later.

cases.summary: Team was discussing the Q3 product roadmap. Decided to keep the notification redesign in Q3 with reduced scope. Mike is leading the effort.
cases.chunk: Has anyone filed the expense reports from the conference last week?

cases.summary: Discussing the server migration from AWS to GCP. John handling database, Lisa doing networking. 6-week timeline.
cases.chunk: About the migration, I found out that our Terraform configs need updating for GCP's API format.

cases.summary: Discussing the server migration from AWS to GCP. John handling database, Lisa doing networking. 6-week timeline.
cases.chunk: So the new parental leave policy gives 16 weeks fully paid. That's really competitive.

cases.summary: Planning the kitchen renovation. Quartz countertops, new backsplash, island addition. Budget $25K. Contractor visit Tuesday.
cases.chunk: Oh I forgot to mention, the contractor said we might need to upgrade the electrical panel to support the island outlets.

cases.summary: Planning the kitchen renovation. Quartz countertops, new backsplash, island addition. Budget $25K. Contractor visit Tuesday.
cases.chunk: We need to schedule Emma's dentist appointment. She's overdue for a cleaning.

cases.summary: Debugging Stripe webhook failures returning 500 errors. Started after yesterday's deploy. Affects 10% of transactions.
cases.chunk: I think the webhook issue might also be related to the rate limiter we added last week.
cases.note: References the webhook issue without explicitly saying 'going back to'

cases.summary: Debugging Stripe webhook failures returning 500 errors. Started after yesterday's deploy. Affects 10% of transactions.
cases.chunk: My car won't start this morning. I think the battery is dead.

cases.summary: Negotiating office lease renewal. Current $45/sqft, landlord wants $52, team thinks $48 fair. Lease expires in 90 days.
cases.chunk: I just heard back from the landlord. He'll do $49 if we commit to 3 years.
cases.note: Direct update on the same negotiation

cases.summary: Negotiating office lease renewal. Current $45/sqft, landlord wants $52, team thinks $48 fair. Lease expires in 90 days.
cases.chunk: The new intern seems really sharp. She already fixed two bugs on her first day.

cases.summary: Reviewing quarterly sales numbers. Revenue up 15%, margins down 3%. Enterprise growing fastest. SMB churn at 8%.
cases.chunk: Actually I pulled the churn numbers by segment and it's even worse for the startup tier. 12% churn there.
cases.note: Deeper dive into the same sales data

cases.summary: Reviewing quarterly sales numbers. Revenue up 15%, margins down 3%. Enterprise growing fastest. SMB churn at 8%.
cases.chunk: Does anyone know a good plumber? My kitchen sink is backed up.

cases.summary: Discussing patient treatment plan. 67-year-old with Type 2 diabetes and hypertension. Metformin 1000mg, lisinopril 20mg. A1C at 7.8.
cases.chunk: I looked at the patient's recent bloodwork and the kidney function is also declining. We should consider adjusting the metformin.

cases.summary: Discussing patient treatment plan. 67-year-old with Type 2 diabetes and hypertension. Metformin 1000mg, lisinopril 20mg. A1C at 7.8.
cases.chunk: The vending machine in the break room is broken again. Who do we call about that?

cases.summary: Planning road trip from LA to San Francisco via PCH. Stopping in Santa Barbara for lunch. Considering Big Sur overnight.
cases.chunk: I just checked the weather forecast and there might be fog on the PCH this weekend. We should have a backup plan.

cases.summary: Planning road trip from LA to San Francisco via PCH. Stopping in Santa Barbara for lunch. Considering Big Sur overnight.
cases.chunk: I need to renew my passport before it expires next month.

cases.summary: Discussing the company's response to a data breach. 50K user records exposed. Legal team advising on notification requirements. PR drafting a public statement.
cases.chunk: Legal just confirmed we have 72 hours to notify affected users under GDPR.

cases.summary: Discussing the company's response to a data breach. 50K user records exposed. Legal team advising on notification requirements. PR drafting a public statement.
cases.chunk: Are we still doing the team lunch on Wednesday? I need to make a reservation.

cases.summary: Home security system comparison. Ring vs SimpliSafe vs ADT. Need cameras for front door, backyard, garage. Want professional monitoring.
cases.chunk: I just realized we also need a camera for the side gate. That's where the delivery drivers usually come.
cases.note: Additional camera placement for same system

cases.summary: Home security system comparison. Ring vs SimpliSafe vs ADT. Need cameras for front door, backyard, garage. Want professional monitoring.
cases.chunk: What should we have for dinner tonight? I was thinking Thai.

cases.summary: Budget allocation for engineering. Last year $2.1M, requesting $2.5M. Need 3 new hires plus infrastructure costs.
cases.chunk: If we hire contractors instead of full-time, we could save about $200K and stay closer to last year's budget.

cases.summary: Budget allocation for engineering. Last year $2.1M, requesting $2.5M. Need 3 new hires plus infrastructure costs.
cases.chunk: My dog ate something weird at the park yesterday and now he's been sick all morning.

cases.summary: Candidate interview review. Strong technical skills, nervous demeanor. Solved system design well. Concerns about communication and culture fit.
cases.chunk: Actually, I want to reconsider. Her GitHub contributions show she's very active in open source, which suggests strong collaboration skills.
cases.note: New data point about same candidate

cases.summary: Candidate interview review. Strong technical skills, nervous demeanor. Solved system design well. Concerns about communication and culture fit.
cases.chunk: Has anyone seen my AirPods? I think I left them in the conference room.

cases.summary: Insurance provider comparison. BlueCross raising premiums. Considering Aetna and United. Open enrollment in November.
cases.chunk: I got the Aetna quote. It's $50 less per employee per month and includes vision.
cases.note: Price quote for same insurance discussion

cases.summary: Insurance provider comparison. BlueCross raising premiums. Considering Aetna and United. Open enrollment in November.
cases.chunk: The projector in conference room B isn't working. Can someone submit a ticket?

cases.summary: Microservices migration architecture. Moving from monolith to event-driven. Kafka for message bus. Target Q2.
cases.chunk: For the auth service, we should use JWT tokens with short expiry and refresh tokens. That way each service can validate independently.
cases.note: Auth design for same architecture project

cases.summary: Microservices migration architecture. Moving from monolith to event-driven. Kafka for message bus. Target Q2.
cases.chunk: I'm thinking of getting a standing desk. My back has been killing me.

cases.summary: Performance review process redesign. Current 1-5 ratings feel arbitrary. Considering narrative approach with clear expectations.
cases.chunk: What if we also add a peer review component? Like 360-degree feedback but lightweight.
cases.note: Process enhancement for same review discussion

cases.summary: Performance review process redesign. Current 1-5 ratings feel arbitrary. Considering narrative approach with clear expectations.
cases.chunk: Traffic is going to be terrible tonight. There's a concert downtown.

cases.summary: Surprise birthday party for Tom on March 20th. Restaurant venue, 15 guests. Coordinating with his wife.
cases.chunk: Tom's wife just texted me. She says she can get him there by 7 PM if we tell him it's a dinner with her parents.

cases.summary: Surprise birthday party for Tom on March 20th. Restaurant venue, 15 guests. Coordinating with his wife.
cases.chunk: The API rate limits are way too aggressive. We're getting throttled during peak hours.

cases.summary: Discussing a potential acquisition of a smaller competitor. Target company has 50 employees and $5M ARR. Due diligence is underway.
cases.chunk: The due diligence team found some IP concerns. Two of their key patents are being challenged.
cases.note: Due diligence update on same acquisition

cases.summary: Discussing a potential acquisition of a smaller competitor. Target company has 50 employees and $5M ARR. Due diligence is underway.
cases.chunk: Can we order more printer paper? We're completely out on the third floor.

cases.summary: Talking about repainting the house exterior. Current color is beige. Considering navy blue with white trim. Getting 3 quotes from painters.
cases.chunk: The second painter said he can start next week if we go with the Sherwin-Williams paint instead of Benjamin Moore.

cases.summary: Talking about repainting the house exterior. Current color is beige. Considering navy blue with white trim. Getting 3 quotes from painters.
cases.chunk: We should sign up for that cooking class. The one that does Italian food on Saturdays.

cases.summary: Discussing the company's sustainability goals. Aiming for carbon neutral by 2027. Considering solar panels for the office, EV charging stations, and switching to recycled packaging.
cases.chunk: The solar panel vendor sent their proposal. Installation would pay for itself in 4 years.
cases.note: Vendor update on same sustainability initiative

cases.summary: Discussing the company's sustainability goals. Aiming for carbon neutral by 2027. Considering solar panels for the office, EV charging stations, and switching to recycled packaging.
cases.chunk: I just finished binge-watching that new show on Netflix. It's so good. You have to watch it.

cases.summary: Reviewing the results of the A/B test on the checkout flow. Version B had 12% higher conversion. Discussing whether to roll it out to all users.
cases.chunk: Before we roll it out, we should check if the results hold for mobile users too. The sample was mostly desktop.
cases.note: Data validation for same A/B test

cases.summary: Reviewing the results of the A/B test on the checkout flow. Version B had 12% higher conversion. Discussing whether to roll it out to all users.
cases.chunk: Is it just me or is the AC not working? It feels like 80 degrees in here.
